name: limena
description: limena's official marketplace — connect accessibility audits, fix-story generation, and program management to Claude.

plugins.name: limena-audit
plugins.description: Drive limena's hosted accessibility audit platform from Claude. Conversational flow: pick a client, pick a program, queue audits across one or many URLs, poll until ready, summarize findings, and apply fix stories. Pairs axe-core deterministic detection with an LLM heuristic engine for content-quality checks (alt text, link text, sensory cues, error messages, language) — ~96% WCAG 2.2 AA coverage. Use when the user wants accessibility audits, WCAG compliance, AODA / Accessible Canada Act / Section 508 / EN 301 549 / Quebec Law 25 reporting, or to fetch findings from a previous limena audit.

LIMENA_API_KEY.title: limena API key
LIMENA_API_KEY.description: Your workspace API key. Generate one at https://console.limena.app/settings/api-keys (Read + Write scopes recommended for conversational use).
